falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its 200-day moving average by at least 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the pattern similarity to a prior bottom and invalidate the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day trading volume spikes to 50% above the 30-day average with a clear bullish divergence
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volume expansion with price momentum would refute the blowoff score's implication of imminent reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score decreases to below 30 with a confirmed bearish reversal pattern forming on the daily chart
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant drop in blowoff pressure combined with a confirmed technical reversal would directly contradict the current UNKNOWN verdict

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
